---
title: Another Project Note
tags: [spike]
---

A second project-side note so the Dataview LIST in `queries/cross-boundary-query.md`
renders more than one row. Without this, a one-row query is indistinguishable
from accidental hardcoding of a single filename.

No cross-boundary wikilinks from this note — its purpose is purely to populate
the Dataview scan.
